name: io.github.brajendrak00068/levea-mcp-server
description: Levea autonomous AI video editor — natural-language video editing (viral clips, captions, vertical reframe, chroma key, audio cleanup, motion tracking, B-roll, voiceover, music, MP4 export) over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: ADSCENE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Levea API base URL, e.g. https://api.livecore.ai

environmentVariables.name: ADSCENE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Levea API key. Generate one at https://studio.livecor.ai/
